q-import { q-components/q-animation-tool.qhtml } q-component animation-tool-card { q-property title: "Animation target" div { style { width: 280px; min-height: 128px; padding: 18px; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.10); } h2 { style { margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 20px; } text { ${this.component.title} } } p { style { margin: 0; color: #475569; line-height: 1.45; } text { The animation tool should place a top-hat button on this component instance. } } } } section { style { min-height: 100vh; padding: 32px; box-sizing: border-box; display: grid; gap: 18px; align-content: start; } h1 { text { q-animation-tool } } animation-tool-card toolTarget { id: "toolTarget" title: "Tool target" } } q-animation-tool tool { } q-timer exerciseAnimationTool { interval: 1000 repeat: false running: true ontimeout { try { document.body.setAttribute("data-status", "running"); var tool = document.querySelector("q-animation-tool"); var target = document.querySelector("#toolTarget"); tool.openForElement(target); tool.selectAnimationKind("q-property-animation"); tool.querySelector("[data-role='duration']").value = "1800"; tool.querySelector("[data-role='steps']").value = "90"; tool.querySelector("[data-role='from-value']").value = "0px"; tool.querySelector("[data-role='to-value']").value = "480px"; var code = tool.addCode(); var pass = code.indexOf("q-property-animation toolTargetPropertyAnimation") >= 0 && code.indexOf("target: \"#toolTarget.style.left\"") >= 0 && document.querySelector("[data-q-animation-tool-button]"); document.body.setAttribute("data-generated-code", code); document.body.setAttribute("data-status", pass ? "pass" : "fail"); } catch (error) { document.body.setAttribute("data-error", error && error.message ? error.message : String(error)); document.body.setAttribute("data-status", "error"); } } }
